reviews.review_description:
This is a really great game, let's get that said first. As other reviewers mentioned, the 'land the planes without hitting each other' concept has been on mobile for a while, but this bringing it into VR really makes it awesome. Unlike the phones this is a 3D environment, giving you (what seems) like a lot more room to work in. 
The game maps are ~6x6 feet (guessing here), but while it's no marathon, there's a huge difference between this and your average Chair Game. 
There is also good variety, with prop, small, jet and unpowered planes in addition to Zeppelins and you may get visited by UFOs. The game is both relaxing and crazy at the same time. Definitely a must play!

I normally write five star reviews but I'm sorry the game is way too hard. I thought this game was going to be nice and relaxing but no the game is just stressful! even on its easiest mode there's way too many planes at once and they end up just crashing into each other! And the game just got boring way too quickly because it's just way too hard!

developer_response.body: I haven’t touched Control Tower VR in a while. But replaying it recently and noticed the easy mode feels much harder than I remembered. So I am adding a “chill difficulty” in 1.04. I hope you will give it another chance when I drop the update.

reviews.review_description:
I used to play this similar game on my phone to pass the time, and it's a refreshing taste to be immersed in VR.
The game introduces some new mechanics (at least for me) with the glyders that can only descend until you catch a column of hot air, the big and slow Zeppelin, as well as having to redirect some planes off the map instead of landing them.

Having a carrer mode also add to the game to keep you playing and discover the next maps.

I went into this skeptical, Dev saying it was a 5 star game ,, 
I spent over an hour playing and it caught me off guard , I loved it ,
Highly recommend this game; I've sunk hours into it!

Control Tower VR lets you control the skies as an air traffic controller who must make sure that all aircraft land in a safe, and timely manor. This game is super fun as you can move the air craft anyway you wish but also have to be sure they do not collide or crash into the ground or other craft. Things can get a bit hectic with all the aircraft flying around but this is a great game and use of virtual reality from the top down perspective like Demeo. I enjoyed this game very must and was pleased to see how well it ran with all of the craft on the screen at once. If you like flight sims or just airplanes pick this up now!
